vehicle.label: Tiltrotor VTOL Hybrid
vehicle.desc: Fixed-wing VTOL with 2 tilting rotor nacelles, BVLOS long-range capable

parts.label: Center Fuselage Spine
parts.spec: CFRP box beam center fuselage, avionics bay, wing spar socket, front GPS boom mount, belly camera window

parts.label: Main Wing (2-piece)
parts.spec: Straight wing, 4S NACA 2412, dual 15mm CFRP spar, 900mm half-span, 160mm chord, 3-layer CFRP skin

parts.label: Nacelle Assembly x 2
parts.spec: Tilting nacelle assembly, 0-90deg tilt axis, 6309 bearing set, servo-driven worm gear, motor and ESC pocket

parts.label: Tilt Servo + Linkage x 2
parts.spec: 25kg-cm DS3218 servo per nacelle, titanium pushrod, dual ball joints, tilt range 0-93deg, crash-tolerant

parts.label: V-Tail x 2 (Ruddervator)
parts.spec: +-35deg V-tail ruddervator pair, MG996R servo each, 30deg dihedral, CFRP sandwich panel, hinge piano wire

parts.label: Landing Gear (Tri)
parts.spec: Tricycle landing gear, spring-steel skid arms, 55mm dia wheels, CG at 1/3 chord, 200mm wheelbase

parts.label: Battery Bay (Slide-In)
parts.spec: Belly slide-in battery bay, 6S 8000mAh Li-ion pack, Velcro + strap dual retention, CG position 28% MAC

parts.label: Payload Nose Bay
parts.spec: Interchangeable nose payload bay, Day/IR camera gimbal or survey sensor, 80x60x50mm, 300g payload limit

parts.label: Tilt-Axis Harness + Datum Service Bay
parts.spec: Tiltrotor integration_service module with tilt-axis harness_channel, slack_loop, interface_datum, service_hatch, connector keying, and nacelle-to-wing load-path inspection access

risk.desc: Potential thermal management issues in the avionics bay.
risk.mit: Implement active cooling systems or enhance passive heat dissipation.

risk.desc: Risk of structural failure due to nacelle loads.
risk.mit: Conduct load tests to ensure the wing spar socket can handle nacelle loads.

risk.desc: Human access to the avionics bay may be limited.
risk.mit: Ensure sufficient service access paths for maintenance and inspection.

risk.desc: Potential issues with fastener locking and preload.
risk.mit: Ensure all critical joints have visible locking evidence and torque_Nm or preload intent.

_subsystem_plan.subsystem_role: CFRP box beam center fuselage, avionics bay, wing spar socket, front GPS boom mount, belly camera window

physics_paths.description: Nacelle loads are transferred from the rotor nacelles to the wing spar socket through the fuselage spine.
Electrical and data signals flow from the avionics bay to the wing spar socket for control and telemetry.
Thermal management from the avionics bay to the fuselage exterior to dissipate heat.
Motion from the V-tail to the ruddervator for pitch and yaw control.
Human access to the avionics bay for maintenance and inspection.

integration_opportunities.description: Electrical service path for control and telemetry.
Thermal management service path for heat dissipation.
Human access for maintenance and inspection.

verification_focus.description: Load test to ensure the wing spar socket can handle nacelle loads.
Thermal test to ensure the avionics bay can dissipate heat effectively.
Check human access to the avionics bay for maintenance and inspection.

risk.desc: Potential thermal management issues due to sun exposure.
risk.mit: Implement thermal management strategies such as heat sinks or reflective coatings.

risk.desc: Risk of electrical harness damage during nacelle tilt.
risk.mit: Ensure sufficient slack and use flexible harnesses.

risk.desc: Structural integrity concerns under high maneuvering loads.
risk.mit: Conduct stress analysis and reinforce critical areas.

risk.desc: Potential misalignment during landing gear deployment.
risk.mit: Include alignment features and conduct alignment checks.

risk.desc: Risk of water ingress through service access panels.
risk.mit: Use waterproof seals and conduct water-tightness tests.

risk.desc: Potential thermal stress due to high heat flux from servo to cooling duct.

risk.desc: Risk of insufficient cooling air flow through the cooling channel.
risk.mit: Increase the size of the cooling channel or improve the air flow design.

risk.desc: The environmental seal may not be sufficient for the -20 to +50C temperature range.
risk.mit: Conduct thermal cycling tests to validate the seal's performance.

risk.desc: The hinge piano wire may not have sufficient preload.
risk.mit: Ensure proper preload is applied during assembly.

risk.desc: The access cover may not provide adequate clearance for servo replacement.
risk.mit: Review and potentially redesign the access cover for better clearance.

requirements: Tiltrotor integration_service module with tilt-axis harness_channel, slack_loop, interface_datum, service_hatch, connector keying, and nacelle-to-wing load-path inspection access
Fixed-wing VTOL with 2 tilting rotor nacelles, BVLOS long-range capable

verify.rule: All required fields are present and correctly formatted.
The mass estimate is a numeric value in grams.
P0 internal_feature_targets appear as part_tree children and geometry_ops ids or targets.
Each interface has a named neighboring subsystem label, connection_type, DOF, clearance, and required_feature.
Critical joints have visible insert/washer/locking/preload evidence and torque_Nm or preload intent.
Boundary conditions are defined with fixture points, thermal zones, and pressure faces.

risk.desc: Potential for harness strain relief failure due to sharp edges and unsupported cable exits.
risk.mit: Add strain relief features and ensure cables do not cross hinge lines unsupported.

risk.desc: Risk of incorrect connector mating due to lack of keying or labeling.
risk.mit: Implement keying or labeling on connectors to prevent mis-mating.

risk.desc: Insufficient clearance stated for moving interfaces.
risk.mit: Specify clearances for critical slip, snap, pin, hinge, and slide interfaces.

risk.desc: Potential for assembly order issues if parts are not reachable.
risk.mit: Ensure assembly sequence is feasible and parts remain accessible.

risk.desc: Risk of uncontrolled tolerance accumulation without a primary datum.
risk.mit: Establish a primary datum part and ensure each part locates off a named parent datum.
